case_title: NICOLE DUENES et al VS. RACHAEL SMITH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUENES, NICOLE YOUNG, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, RACHAEL $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,780.00, THE JUDGMENT IS IN ADDITION TO DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS REFUND OF $5000.00. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,700.00 FILED BY DUENES, NICOLE YOUNG, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, RACHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, RACHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
